en.title_long_prefix: Crafted with logic, creativity and iteration

de.title_long_prefix: Erschaffen mit Logik, Kreativität und Iteration

en.title: Java Learning Project: Belot
en.text: University project focused on learning Java programming by developing a Belot card game. Implemented core game logic, user interaction, and basic AI opponents.

de.title: Java-Lernprojekt: Belot
de.text: Universitätsprojekt zum Erlernen der Java-Programmierung durch die Entwicklung eines Belot-Kartenspiels. Implementierung der Spiel-Logik, Benutzerinteraktion und einfacher KI-Gegner.

hr.title: Java projekt učenja: Belot
hr.text: Sveučilišni projekt usmjeren na učenje Java programiranja kroz razvoj igre Belot. Implementirana osnovna logika igre, interakcija s korisnikom i jednostavni AI protivnici.

tr.title: Java Öğrenme Projesi: Belot
tr.text: Belot kart oyunu geliştirerek Java programlama öğrenmeye odaklanan üniversite projesi. Temel oyun mantığı, kullanıcı etkileşimi ve basit AI rakipleri uygulandı.

en.title: Pepper & Nao Poker Game
en.text: University project using Pepper and Nao robots to create an interactive poker game with animations and real-time card dealing on a monitor.

de.title: Pepper & Nao Pokerspiel
de.text: Universitätsprojekt mit Pepper- und Nao-Robotern zur Erstellung eines interaktiven Pokerspiels mit Animationen und Echtzeit-Kartenverteilung auf einem Monitor.

hr.title: Poker igra s Pepper i Nao robotima
hr.text: Sveučilišni projekt korištenjem Pepper i Nao robota za stvaranje interaktivne poker igre s animacijama i dijeljenjem karata u realnom vremenu na monitoru.

tr.title: Pepper & Nao Poker Oyunu
tr.text: Pepper ve Nao robotlarını kullanarak, animasyonlu ve gerçek zamanlı kart dağıtımının yapıldığı interaktif bir poker oyunu oluşturan üniversite projesi.

en.title: Simon Game: Multiplayer & Database
en.text: University project combining theoretical knowledge to create a multiplayer Simon Game with a physical and virtual server database for high scores and user management.

de.title: Simon-Spiel: Mehrspieler & Datenbank
de.text: Universitätsprojekt zur Kombination von theoretischem Wissen für ein Mehrspieler-Simon-Spiel mit physischer und virtueller Server-Datenbank für Highscores und Benutzerverwaltung.

hr.title: Simon igra: Višeigrač & baza podataka
hr.text: Sveučilišni projekt kombiniranjem teorijskog znanja za stvaranje višeigračke Simon igre s fizičkom i virtualnom server bazom podataka za rezultate i upravljanje korisnicima.

tr.title: Simon Oyunu: Çoklu Oyuncu & Veritabanı
tr.text: Teorik bilgiyi birleştiren, fiziksel ve sanal sunucu veritabanı ile yüksek skorlar ve kullanıcı yönetimi için çoklu oyuncu Simon oyunu oluşturan üniversite projesi.

en.title: GermanCro - Language Learning Tool
en.text: Personal project for learning German through English and Croatian, featuring translation tools, quizzes, and interactive language exercises for effective and fun learning.

de.title: GermanCro - Language Learning Tool
de.text: Persönliches Projekt zum Deutschlernen über Englisch und Kroatisch mit Übersetzungs-Tools, Quizzen und interaktiven Sprachübungen für effektives und unterhaltsames Lernen.

hr.title: GermanCro - Language Learning Tool
hr.text: Osobni projekt za učenje njemačkog kroz engleski i hrvatski, s alatima za prijevod, kvizovima i interaktivnim vježbama za učinkovito i zabavno učenje.

tr.title: GermanCro - Language Learning Tool
tr.text: İngilizce ve Hırvatça aracılığıyla Almanca öğrenmeye yönelik kişisel proje. Çeviri araçları, testler ve etkileşimli dil alıştırmaları ile eğlenceli ve etkili öğrenme sunar.

en.title: Villa Bagara: Renovation Project
en.text: Website for the future renovation project of an ancestral home, designed as a mountain sports and retreat rental. Currently in the planning and building phase.

de.title: Villa Bagara: Renovierungsprojekt
de.text: Website für das zukünftige Renovierungsprojekt eines Ahnenhauses, das als Bergsport- und Rückzugsort vermietet werden soll. Derzeit in der Planungs- und Bauphase.

hr.title: Villa Bagara: Projekt obnove
hr.text: Web stranica za budući projekt obnove obiteljske kuće, namijenjena kao planinski sportski i odmarališni prostor. Trenutno u fazi planiranja i izgradnje.

tr.title: Villa Bagara: Yenileme Projesi
tr.text: Atalarından kalan bir evin gelecekteki yenileme projesi için web sitesi. Dağ sporları ve dinlenme tesisi olarak tasarlandı. Şu anda planlama ve inşa aşamasında.

en.title: LaTeX CV
en.text: Personal CV designed in LaTeX, featuring a beautiful, detail-packed yet concise format that respects the 15-second rule for quick readability.

de.title: LaTeX-Lebenslauf
de.text: Persönlicher Lebenslauf in LaTeX, mit einem schönen, detailreichen, aber prägnanten Format, das die 15-Sekunden-Regel für schnelle Lesbarkeit einhält.

hr.title: LaTeX životopis
hr.text: Osobni životopis dizajniran u LaTeX-u, s lijepim, detaljnim, ali sažetim formatom koji poštuje 15-sekundno pravilo za brzo čitanje.

tr.title: LaTeX Özgeçmiş
tr.text: LaTeX ile tasarlanmış kişisel özgeçmiş. Güzel, detaylı ancak özlü bir formatta, hızlı okunabilirlik için 15 saniye kuralına uygun.

en.title: HTML Family Tree
en.text: Interactive family tree project built in HTML and designed for clarity, making it easy to explore relatives, branches, and generations directly in the browser.

de.title: HTML-Stammbaum
de.text: Interaktives Stammbaum-Projekt in HTML, klar gestaltet und direkt im Browser nutzbar, damit sich Verwandtschaftsbeziehungen, Linien und Generationen leicht erkunden lassen.

hr.title: HTML obiteljsko stablo
hr.text: Interaktivni projekt obiteljskog stabla izra?en u HTML-u i slo?en za jasni pregled, tako da se rodbinske veze, grane i generacije mogu lako istra?ivati izravno u pregledniku.

tr.title: HTML Aile Ağacı
tr.text: HTML ile haz?rlanm?? ve netlik i?in tasarlanm?? etkile?imli aile a?ac? projesi; akrabalar?, dallar? ve ku?aklar? do?rudan taray?c?da kolayca ke?fetmeyi sa?lar.

en.title: Browser Homepage Organization
en.text: Group Speed Dial turns the chaotic browser start page into a [[control center]]. Instead of drowning in bookmarks, everything becomes visual, grouped, and instantly accessible. It's simple in theory but surprisingly powerful in practice.

de.title: Browser-Startseiten Organisation
de.text: Group Speed Dial verwandelt die chaotische Browser-Startseite in ein [[Kontrollzentrum]]. Statt in Lesezeichen zu ertrinken, wird alles visuell organisiert und schnell erreichbar.

hr.title: Organizacija početne stranice preglednika
hr.text: Group Speed Dial pretvara kaotičnu početnu stranicu preglednika u [[kontrolni centar]]. Sve je vizualno organizirano i brzo dostupno.

tr.title: Tarayıcı Ana Sayfa Organizasyonu
tr.text: Group Speed Dial, tarayıcı ana sayfanızı bir [[kontrol merkezine]] dönüştürüyor. Yer imleri karmaşası yerine her şey görsel ve düzenli.

en.title: Amazon Price Tracker
en.text: Keepa quietly gives shoppers [[data superpowers]]. The price history graphs reveal when deals are real and when they're just marketing theater.

de.title: Amazon Preis-Tracker
de.text: Keepa verleiht Käufern [[Daten-Superkräfte]]. Preisdiagramme zeigen sofort, ob ein Angebot wirklich ein Schnäppchen ist.

hr.title: Praćenje cijena na Amazonu
hr.text: Keepa kupcima daje [[supermoći podataka]]. Povijest cijena otkriva jesu li popusti stvarni.

tr.title: Amazon Fiyat Takibi
tr.text: Keepa alışverişçilere [[veri süper güçleri]] verir. Fiyat geçmişi gerçek indirimleri ortaya çıkarır.

en.title: Self-Hosted Cloud
en.text: Nextcloud is what happens when you decide the cloud should belong to [[you]]. File sync, collaboration, and apps—all running on your own infrastructure.

de.title: Selbstgehostete Cloud
de.text: Nextcloud ist die Cloud, die wirklich [[Ihnen gehört]]. Dateien, Zusammenarbeit und Apps auf eigener Infrastruktur.

hr.title: Samostalno hostana cloud platforma
hr.text: Nextcloud je cloud koji stvarno [[posjedujete]]. Sinkronizacija datoteka i suradnja na vlastitom serveru.

tr.title: Kendi Barındırılan Bulut
tr.text: Nextcloud, bulutun gerçekten [[size ait]] olduğu bir platformdur.

en.title: Free Knowledge Encyclopedia
en.text: Wikipedia remains one of humanity's most astonishing projects: millions of people building a [[shared knowledge archive]] together.

de.title: Freie Wissens-Enzyklopädie
de.text: Wikipedia ist eines der erstaunlichsten Projekte der Menschheit: ein [[gemeinsames Wissensarchiv]].

hr.title: Besplatna enciklopedija
hr.text: Wikipedia je [[zajednička baza znanja]] koju gradi cijeli svijet.

tr.title: Ücretsiz Bilgi Ansiklopedisi
tr.text: Wikipedia, insanlığın birlikte oluşturduğu [[bilgi arşivi]].

en.title: European AI Platform
en.text: Mistral represents a fascinating direction for AI: powerful models built with [[European openness and research culture]].

de.title: Europäische KI
de.text: Mistral zeigt eine spannende Richtung für KI: leistungsstarke Modelle mit [[europäischen Werten]].

hr.title: Europska umjetna inteligencija
hr.text: Mistral predstavlja novu generaciju [[europske umjetne inteligencije]].

tr.title: Avrupa Yapay Zekası
tr.text: Mistral, [[Avrupa merkezli]] güçlü yapay zeka modellerini temsil ediyor.

en.title: Diagram Tool
en.text: draw.io is the unsung hero of [[visual thinking]]. When systems get complex, diagrams turn confusion into clarity.

de.title: Diagramm-Tool
de.text: draw.io ist ein Held für [[visuelles Denken]]. Komplexe Systeme werden plötzlich verständlich.

hr.title: Alat za dijagrame
hr.text: draw.io pomaže pretvoriti složene ideje u [[jasne dijagrame]].

tr.title: Diyagram Aracı
tr.text: draw.io, karmaşık fikirleri [[görsel olarak]] açıklamak için mükemmeldir.

en.title: Virtualization Platform
en.text: Proxmox turns a humble server into a [[mini data center]]. Virtual machines, containers, backups—an incredible playground for anyone exploring infrastructure.

de.title: Virtualisierungsplattform
de.text: Proxmox verwandelt einen Server in ein [[Mini-Rechenzentrum]].

hr.title: Virtualizacijska platforma
hr.text: Proxmox pretvara server u [[mini data centar]].

tr.title: Sanallaştırma Platformu
tr.text: Proxmox, bir sunucuyu [[mini veri merkezine]] dönüştürür.

en.title: Private Networking
en.text: Tailscale feels like [[networking from the future]]. Devices simply see each other securely without the usual VPN headaches.

de.title: Privates Netzwerk
de.text: Tailscale fühlt sich an wie [[Netzwerke aus der Zukunft]].

hr.title: Privatna mreža
hr.text: Tailscale omogućuje [[sigurno povezivanje uređaja]].

tr.title: Özel Ağ
tr.text: Tailscale, cihazları [[güvenli şekilde]] birbirine bağlar.

en.title: Market Analysis Platform
en.text: TradingView blends charts, social insights, and analysis into one elegant interface—making financial markets surprisingly [[intuitive to explore]].

de.title: Marktanalyse Plattform
de.text: TradingView kombiniert Charts und Analysen zu einer [[intuitiven Plattform]].

hr.title: Analiza tržišta
hr.text: TradingView spaja grafikone i analize u [[jednostavnu platformu]].

tr.title: Piyasa Analizi
tr.text: TradingView, grafikler ve analizleri [[tek bir platformda]] birleÅŸtirir.

en.title: Note Taking & Knowledge Base
en.text: Joplin is a [[serious tool]] for people who think in notes. Markdown support, encryption, and flexible syncing make it feel more like a personal knowledge system than just another notebook.

de.title: Notizen & Wissensverwaltung
de.text: Joplin ist ein [[ernsthaftes Werkzeug]] für Menschen, die in Notizen denken. Markdown, Verschlüsselung und flexible Synchronisation machen es zu einem persönlichen Wissenssystem.

hr.title: Bilješke i organizacija znanja
hr.text: Joplin je [[moćan alat]] za bilješke. Markdown, enkripcija i sinkronizacija čine ga pravim sustavom za znanje.

tr.title: Not Alma Sistemi
tr.text: Joplin sadece bir not uygulaması değil, [[kişisel bilgi sistemi]] gibi çalışır.

en.title: Multi-Monitor Control
en.text: DisplayFusion turns a chaotic multi-monitor setup into a [[precision workspace]]. Once you experience proper window management and automation, going back feels primitive.

de.title: Multi-Monitor Steuerung
de.text: DisplayFusion verwandelt ein chaotisches Multi-Monitor-Setup in einen [[präzisen Arbeitsplatz]].

hr.title: Upravljanje više monitora
hr.text: DisplayFusion pretvara više monitora u [[organizirani radni prostor]].

tr.title: Çoklu Monitör Yönetimi
tr.text: DisplayFusion çoklu monitör kurulumunu [[verimli bir çalışma alanına]] dönüştürür.

en.title: PDF Editing
en.text: Foxit proves that a PDF editor can be both [[powerful and fast]]. Compared to heavier alternatives, it feels agile while still handling serious document work.

de.title: PDF-Bearbeitung
de.text: Foxit zeigt, dass ein PDF-Editor [[leistungsstark und schnell]] sein kann.

hr.title: Uređivanje PDF-a
hr.text: Foxit je [[brz i moćan]] alat za rad s PDF dokumentima.

tr.title: PDF Düzenleme
tr.text: Foxit, PDF düzenlemeyi [[hızlı ve güçlü]] hale getirir.

en.title: Audio Enhancement
en.text: FxSound is a small but fascinating tool that squeezes [[surprising clarity]] out of ordinary speakers. Sometimes simple signal processing can make a big difference.

de.title: Audio-Verbesserung
de.text: FxSound holt [[erstaunliche Klangqualität]] aus normalen Lautsprechern.

hr.title: Poboljšanje zvuka
hr.text: FxSound daje [[jasniji zvuk]] čak i običnim zvučnicima.

tr.title: Ses GeliÅŸtirme
tr.text: FxSound sıradan hoparlörlerden [[daha iyi ses]] elde etmenizi sağlar.

en.title: Code Editor
en.text: VS Code is the [[Swiss-army knife]] of development environments. Lightweight at its core, yet endlessly extendable through its ecosystem.

de.title: Code-Editor
de.text: VS Code ist das [[Schweizer Taschenmesser]] der Entwicklungsumgebungen.

hr.title: Uređivač koda
hr.text: VS Code je [[švicarski nož]] među editorima koda.

tr.title: Kod Editörü
tr.text: VS Code geliştiriciler için [[çok yönlü]] bir editördür.

en.title: Git Client
en.text: GitHub Desktop lowers the barrier to version control. It turns complex Git workflows into something [[visual and approachable]].

de.title: Git-Client
de.text: GitHub Desktop macht Versionskontrolle [[visuell und zugänglich]].

hr.title: Git klijent
hr.text: GitHub Desktop čini Git [[lakšim za razumjeti]].

tr.title: Git İstemcisi
tr.text: GitHub Desktop, Git işlemlerini [[görsel ve kolay]] hale getirir.

en.title: Email Client
en.text: Thunderbird remains one of the few email clients that still respects [[user control]]. Open-source, customizable, and surprisingly powerful.

de.title: E-Mail-Client
de.text: Thunderbird respektiert noch immer [[die Kontrolle des Nutzers]].

hr.title: Email klijent
hr.text: Thunderbird je [[moćan open-source]] email klijent.

tr.title: E-posta İstemcisi
tr.text: Thunderbird, kullanıcıya [[kontrol veren]] açık kaynaklı bir e-posta istemcisidir.

en.title: Network Analyzer
en.text: Wireshark lets you literally [[see the internet]] packet by packet. For anyone studying networking, it turns theory into something observable.

de.title: Netzwerkanalyse
de.text: Wireshark lässt Sie das Internet [[Paket für Paket]] sehen.

hr.title: Analiza mreže
hr.text: Wireshark omogućuje da [[vidite mrežni promet]].

tr.title: AÄŸ Analizi
tr.text: Wireshark, aÄŸ trafiÄŸini [[paket paket]] analiz etmenizi saÄŸlar.

en.title: Password Manager
en.text: Bitwarden solves one of the most common security problems: humans and passwords. Open-source and transparent, it's a [[solid foundation]] for personal security.

de.title: Passwort-Manager
de.text: Bitwarden löst eines der größten Sicherheitsprobleme: [[Passwörter]].

hr.title: Upravitelj lozinki
hr.text: Bitwarden je [[sigurno rješenje]] za upravljanje lozinkama.

tr.title: Şifre Yöneticisi
tr.text: Bitwarden, [[güvenli şifre yönetimi]] için sağlam bir çözümdür.

en.title: Decentralized Messaging
en.text: bitchat explores an intriguing idea: communication without centralized control. It's a small but fascinating example of [[decentralized technology]] challenging the traditional messaging model.

de.title: Dezentrale Kommunikation
de.text: bitchat zeigt eine spannende Idee: Kommunikation ohne zentrale Kontrolle – ein Beispiel für [[dezentrale Technologie]].

hr.title: Decentralizirana komunikacija
hr.text: bitchat istražuje ideju komunikacije bez centralne kontrole – zanimljiv primjer [[decentralizirane tehnologije]].

tr.title: Merkezi Olmayan MesajlaÅŸma
tr.text: bitchat, merkezi kontrol olmadan iletişim fikrini araştıran ilginç bir [[merkeziyetsiz teknoloji]] örneğidir.

en.title: Weather Forecast
en.text: yr delivers weather forecasts with impressive accuracy and scientific transparency. It's one of the rare weather apps where the data feels genuinely [[meteorology-driven]] rather than ad-driven.

de.title: Wettervorhersage
de.text: yr liefert erstaunlich präzise Vorhersagen und wirkt stark [[wissenschaftlich fundiert]].

hr.title: Vremenska prognoza
hr.text: yr pruža vrlo precizne prognoze temeljene na [[meteorološkim podacima]].

tr.title: Hava Durumu
tr.text: yr, gerçekten [[meteoroloji temelli]] hava tahminleri sunan güvenilir bir uygulamadır.

en.title: Food Transparency
en.text: Yuka transforms grocery shopping into a small investigation. Scan a product and suddenly you see ingredients, additives, and health ratings—giving consumers [[real informational leverage]].

de.title: Lebensmittel-Transparenz
de.text: Yuka macht Einkaufen zu einer kleinen Analyse: Inhaltsstoffe und Bewertungen schaffen [[Transparenz]].

hr.title: Transparentnost hrane
hr.text: Yuka pretvara kupovinu hrane u malu analizu – daje potrošačima [[informacijsku prednost]].

tr.title: Gıda Şeffaflığı
tr.text: Yuka, ürünleri tarayarak içerikleri ve katkı maddelerini gösterir ve kullanıcılara [[bilgi gücü]] verir.

en.title: AI Bible Study
en.text: BibleAI mixes ancient texts with modern machine intelligence. It allows quick exploration of passages, themes, and interpretations—turning scripture study into a surprisingly [[interactive experience]].

de.title: KI Bibelstudium
de.text: BibleAI verbindet alte Texte mit moderner KI und macht das Studium der Bibel [[interaktiv]].

hr.title: AI proučavanje Biblije
hr.text: BibleAI kombinira drevne tekstove s umjetnom inteligencijom za [[interaktivno proučavanje]].

tr.title: Yapay Zeka ile İncil
tr.text: BibleAI, kutsal metinleri yapay zekâ ile analiz ederek [[etkileşimli bir çalışma]] sunar.

en.title: Architecture & Planning
en.text: Floor Plan Creator turns a smartphone into a surprisingly capable [[architectural sketchpad]]. Designing rooms or planning renovations becomes intuitive and visual.

de.title: Raumplanung
de.text: Floor Plan Creator verwandelt das Smartphone in ein [[Werkzeug für Raumplanung]].

hr.title: Planiranje prostora
hr.text: Floor Plan Creator omogućuje jednostavno [[dizajniranje prostora]].

tr.title: Kat Planı Tasarımı
tr.text: Floor Plan Creator, telefonunuzu bir [[mimari tasarım aracı]] haline getirir.

en.title: Spaced Repetition Learning
en.text: AnkiDroid uses one of the most powerful learning techniques known: [[spaced repetition]]. Knowledge resurfaces exactly when your brain is about to forget it.

de.text: AnkiDroid nutzt [[Spaced Repetition]] – eine der effektivsten Lernmethoden.

hr.text: AnkiDroid koristi [[spaced repetition]] za dugoročno pamćenje.

tr.title: Aralıklı Tekrar Öğrenme
tr.text: AnkiDroid, [[spaced repetition]] yöntemiyle öğrenmeyi güçlendirir.

en.title: Creative Image Editing
en.text: Picsart transforms the phone into a portable [[creative studio]]. From quick edits to surprisingly complex compositions, it encourages visual experimentation.

de.text: Picsart verwandelt das Smartphone in ein [[kreatives Studio]].

hr.title: Uređivanje slika

tr.title: Görsel Düzenleme
tr.text: Picsart, telefonu [[yaratıcı bir stüdyoya]] dönüştürür.

en.title: Navigation & Exploration
en.text: Google Maps quietly became one of humanity's most powerful navigation tools. Entire cities unfold on your screen, turning exploration into a [[data-guided adventure]].

de.title: Navigation & Erkundung
de.text: Google Maps macht Städte zu einer [[datenbasierten Entdeckungsreise]].

hr.text: Google Maps pretvara gradove u [[digitalnu kartu istraživanja]].
